tweets.text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

With the US and Iran now trading blows, there were no US escorts in the last 24 hours. Inbound VLCCs unrelated to Iran fell to zero for the last 2 days.

The key to the oil math was always inbound tankers, not outbound tankers. With no incoming VLCCs, production shut-in will rise, which is the essence of the oil market deficit.

As you will see in the @MarineTraffic video, AIS spoofing appears about halfway through. According to @MenchOsint 's reporting today, IRGC speed boats turned vessels around in the Oman lane. This will also prevent shadow transits from taking place.

With US conducting the largest strike since the ceasefire took place in April, it will be interesting to see what develops further.

I have included my inbound tanker list below for the last 3 days.
tweets.full_text:
Strait of Hormuz over the last 24 hours.

With the US and Iran now trading blows, there were no US escorts in the last 24 hours. Inbound VLCCs unrelated to Iran fell to zero for the last 2 days.

The key to the oil math was always inbound tankers, not outbound tankers. With no incoming VLCCs, production shut-in will rise, which is the essence of the oil market deficit.

As you will see in the @MarineTraffic video, AIS spoofing appears about halfway through. According to @MenchOsint 's reporting today, IRGC speed boats turned vessels around in the Oman lane. This will also prevent shadow transits from taking place.

With US conducting the largest strike since the ceasefire took place in April, it will be interesting to see what develops further.

I have included my inbound tanker list below for the last 3 days.

tweets.quoted_tweet_text:
Bloom Energy supplies Nebius, but who supplies Bloom?

$BE is the largest consumer of scandium on the planet, it's needed for their SOFC tech.

90% of scandium supply comes from China, and it's on the export control list.  

Sunrise Energy Resources (https://t.co/85qOvieLLE) is https://t.co/70JLbiObb2
